# coreweave_sandbox_profile_template (Data Source)

Read a CoreWeave Sandbox profile template by ID or display name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coreweave_sandbox_profile_template" "default" {
  id = "default-cpu"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Server-assigned UUID, or the user-set `display_name`. UUID lookup is preferred and falls back to display name on no-match.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String) Human-readable description.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable template name.
- `labels` (Map of String) User-defined labels.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization that owns this template.
- `spec` (Attributes) Profile specification. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec`

Read-Only:

- `container_image` (String)
- `instance_types` (List of String)
- `namespace_config_json` (String)
- `network_config_json` (String)
- `node_selector` (Map of String)
- `pod_template_json` (String)
- `resource_defaults` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--resource_defaults))
- `runtime_class` (String)
- `tags` (List of String)

<a id="nestedatt--spec--resource_defaults"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.resource_defaults`

Read-Only:

- `cpu_limit` (String)
- `cpu_request` (String)
- `memory_limit` (String)
- `memory_request` (String)
